name: San Francisco Zoo
note: Archive documents linked to this place; source labels honour the SFPL-vs-Democracy's-Library distinction.

documents.title: San Francisco Zoological Gardens master plan : final environmental impact report
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Planning Dept
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: The 1998 Planning Commission motion certifying the Zoological Gardens Master Plan final EIR, which flagged demolition of the Aviary, Lion House and Pachyderm House in a potential zoo historic district.

documents.title: San Francisco Zoological Gardens : infrastructure master plan : final report
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Dept. of Public Works,Kennedy/Jenks Consultants,AGS, Inc,San Francisco Zoological Society
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 1995 Public Works infrastructure master plan for the zoo, covering potable, groundwater and reclaimed-water systems and construction-cost estimates.

documents.title: Meeting agenda
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Board of Supervisors. Zoo Audit Select Committee
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 2003 Zoo Audit Select Committee agenda taking up the Budget Analyst's performance audit of the San Francisco Zoo.

documents.title: Annual report
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Recreation and Park Dept
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 1965 Recreation and Park annual report's zoo division section, noting growing attendance, a new giraffe barn, and the Zoological Society's concession contract.

documents.title: Performance audit of the San Francisco Zoo
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Board of Supervisors. Budget Analyst,San Francisco (Calif.). Board of Supervisors
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: The Budget Analyst's January 2000 performance audit of the zoo — 15 findings, 75 recommendations — identifying about $4.53 million for reallocation, under Zoological Society management.

documents.title: San Francisco municipal record
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 1929 municipal record recounting the founding of Fleishhacker Zoo and its original animal collection under director George Bistany.
